methods.description: Collection of surface-sediment samples from Lugu Lake to analyze sediment composition and associated environmental variables.

steps.description: Surface-sediment samples (0-1 cm) were collected with a Kajak gravity corer from 46 sites along the depth gradient of the lake in August 2010.
steps.searchable_summary: collect surface-sediment samples using Kajak gravity corer

methods.description: Survey of macrophyte distribution in Lugu Lake to understand the ecological characteristics of the lake.

steps.description: The distribution of macrophytes was surveyed.

methods.description: Collection of water samples and measurement of various water quality parameters in the field to assess the lake's environmental conditions.

steps.description: Water samples were also collected at each site.
steps.searchable_summary: collect water samples at each site

steps.description: Water depth, Secchi depth, water temperature, dissolved oxygen (DO), pH and conductivity were measured in the field using an YSI 650 multi-parameter display system (model 650 MDS; YSI Inc., Yellow Springs, OH, USA) with a 600XL probe.
steps.searchable_summary: measure water quality parameters using YSI 650 MDS

methods.description: Analysis of water samples in the laboratory to determine chemical variables such as total nitrogen, total phosphorus, and other compounds.

steps.description: Total nitrogen (TN), total phosphorus (TP) and concentration of HCO3- and CO32-, and Chlorophyll-a (Chl-a) were analysed using Water and Waste water Monitoring Methods (EPA, 2002).
steps.searchable_summary: analyze chemical variables using EPA methods

methods.description: Analysis of surface sediment samples to determine loss-on-ignition and grain size.

steps.description: Loss-on-ignition (LOI) and grain size of the surface sediment were also calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate loss-on-ignition and grain size of sediment
